title: Basic JavaScript IndexedDB
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript IndexedDB. Focus on implementing IndexedDB opening (indexedDB.open) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript IndexedDB
description: Create a function that uses IndexedDB opening (indexedDB.open) and Object stores together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript IndexedDB Project
description: Build a small application that applies IndexedDB opening (indexedDB.open), Object stores, Indexes for searching in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript IndexedDB
description: The following code has bugs related to IndexedDB opening (indexedDB.open). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript IndexedDB
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with IndexedDB opening (indexedDB.open) and Object stores.
